target: (The back of my eyes, my head... it hurts like it's splitting open... I feel like I'm going to fall... off the cliff...!!)
(Ushio's lock of hair is in my hand!! Did I return to "just a moment ago"...!? Has the battle already started!!)
(There's no one nearby? Everyone has already taken their positions! I have to tell them about this quickly...!)
They already know everyone's positions! Hurry and get away from here—
It seems this is the end.

Congratulations on the bad ending.
Shinpei-kun.
(It's past 7:40. While I'm waiting for them in the schoolyard...)
(Behind me, from the second floor of the school building, Nezu-san has his rifle ready and is keeping watch.)
Shinpei! They're coming at ya head-on!
You've brought quite a crowd with you, Shide.
You too... It seems you've gained quite a few allies, Shinpei-kun.
I don't see anyone else around... I suppose they're hiding somewhere? Is this a trap?
Don't lump us in with you. We wouldn't do something cowardly like you guys. Let's both stop the cheap tricks and fight fair and square.
That's exactly what I want... Right, Mio-chan!
Sis, you were transformed into a watch...
(Their target is my life!! I'll act as bait and lure them in!)
So much for fighting fair and square!!!
So that hunter was hiding. Shinpei Ajiro... what a shrewd guy...!!
Shinpei-san, Ushio-san, leave this to me and hurry inside.

(…Even if I talk here,
you probably can't hear me…)
(I forgot to tell you something important, Ryunosuke.)
She's here!!! It's your turn, you two!!
Watch this, Mio!! I'll take her down!!!
Idiot... Big Brother. Getting heated and rushing in is a bad habit of yours...
Go wild. Like a bomb, quietly.
(...Next, I'll hit this sensor with a smoke bomb...!)
(I can't make a sound...! My role is to corner the enemy... And to make absolutely sure I'm not found!!)
(...Everyone is fighting with their lives on the line, and I'm the only one hiding... it's frustrating.)
(To do everything I can to protect the people of this island.)
Shall we chase him from another route? Like the upper floor...
...Oh? The fire shutters are closed, so we can't go up.
What will we do? I can easily break through something like this.
There's no need for that. Because Shinpei is at the end of their plan.
Hehe, in that case let's do as they wish.
(He dodged it!! The bullet that was "supposed to hit"!!?)
That's too bad. Now it's my turn.
Oh, did you realize I was aiming for Shinpei-kun over there?
He shielded him just like I said, didn't he? Even though he shouldn't have known where you were going to shoot.
(This guy... can he see it...!! My movements... "two seconds ahead"...!!)
My shotgun...! Where on earth from...?
That old man... He really is a good shot...!!
That Mio, what is she dawdling for.
If you mean Mio-chan, look outside the window. She's having a tough time against Tokiko-chan.
Oh, it's no problem. Once we stop Tokiko-chan's Shadows, it'll be settled quickly.
Yer boss is no longer Tokiko.
Roz and Gil are already my kids now.
The Strays I attached to Tokiko!! <color=#GF_KEY_HACKING>Their connection</color> with me <color=#GF_KEY_HACKING>is cut</color>!!!
The only one who can do something like this is...!
An intense presence from behind... Shide and the others are chasing us!
(What is that!? Other Shadows are mixing into Shide's body!)
(But that doesn't matter! I'll make sure to lead them right to him!)
(As expected of Mio's Shadow. She's super flexible. Mio has good reflexes, after all...)
(Ah… I want to keep watching forever…)
(...You did well leading them here, Ushio!)
(Is that... Shide!? He looks just like a giant spider!)
You said we'd fight fair and square, but you were lying...
That's cruel... I actually believed you for a second. I'm pure, despite how I look.
(...They still haven't noticed us up here on the second floor.)
I knew you'd chase me. You guys would chase me even knowing it's a trap. Acting all relaxed like that.
So ya think yer above all of us?
(The pieces of Ushio's hair fluttering in the gym...)
(Printed out a massive amount of gasoline!)
(Now I just have to light it with this match...)
(But I can't mess up the timing... It should be more effective after the vaporized gasoline fills the room.)
(Crap, I have to light it fast!!)

Oh my… 
You dropped the match, didn't you?

What a shame.
Without a match how would you light it…
Hehe, I got the best part!!
(Totsumura-san! You used your bullets to light the fire!!)

It's working!!! 
The hypothesis that shadows are weak to fire was correct!!!
Hehe, the whole floor is covered in gasoline and a sea of flames! There's no escape for them!!
(The shadow is peeling off from Shide... And he's returning to his original four-armed form...)
(It seems that its monstrous form was formed by absorbing other shadows…!?)

Mm!?
His gun…
It's gone!? Where is it--
(Perfect timing, Ushio! Now I'll turn the hair I'm holding...!)
(The gun Totsumura-san had was a copy)
(When Haine aimed at Totsumura-san, Ushio quickly erased his gun, and then transformed the hair I was holding into a gun)
(And then I used that gun to shoot Haine's 'main body' right in the throat.)

(It's working!!! 
Shadows are definitely weak to fire!!)

(The whole floor is a sea of gasoline flames…
They have no escape!!)
(Other shadows... are peeling off of Shide?!)
Sorry, Dad... Mom... everyone. It's hot, isn't it... but it's okay.
It'll all go back to normal after I kill him!
If you're going to look at the big picture, you shouldn't look away, Haine.
I won't let go! I'm erasing you!!!
Always smirking like that in Shiori-chan's form! You fake!!
I'm going home with this child... with this family... We'll all... be together forever...
Haine...! E-Even if you cry, I won't forgive you!!!

Hahaha… you let your guard down.
Is it hot?
Ushio-chan... Y-You might not be able to kill me with fire, b-but you're going to die...
I-I was th-th-thinking... You and Haine can carry over the information you have to the next loop, right?
Doesn't that mean... you would also carry over data 'corruption'... and even 'death'?
(I-I have to save Ushio...!! Ushio is... going to burn up!!! And yet my body... won't... move...)
It will take a few minutes for Shinpei-kun to die. I deliberately avoided his vitals, you s-see...
I'm getting really interested to see what happens if Ushio-chan dies right here, right now! Before Shinpei-kun does!
(Ushio is burning... turning into just a black shadow...)
Sorry, but I'm not interested. I have no intention of dying!!!!
You're... quick... I didn't notice you had switched places...
What I was holding was... a doll... printed on a bundle of hair...
(Ushio herself had transformed into the necklace!)
B-Besides, I see! This fire is--

You're not invincible…
I'll erase you!!!
(Just now... I saw a human hand...!? There's... someone inside him!)
(...Haine!? She can still move in that condition--)

(The fire… it's gone!!!
In an instant!!!)
Geha! Hah... guh! I... I can't breathe...
(A massive amount of glass shards are blowing in...!!)
I was so close to erasing it...
Yes... If I knead it, it will return to normal...
...Shinpei-kun is fatally wounded by my bullets. He should die in a few minutes, and the final loop should begin.
Fufu... I'm fine...! I just made a lot of copies... and got tired... There's no need to worry so--
But you're bleeding!! Don't you dare try to act tough anymore, okay!?
This blood is just from the glass hitting my 3D body. It'll disappear soon, and I don't have any burns! I only burned my hair and them.
More importantly, Shinpei, you were shot, weren't you!? That's a much more serious injury...!!
A bulletproof vest... I was wearing it under my clothes. I found how to make it online.
D-Don't hug me, I said don't! I still got hit in the shoulder and side!!
Ryunosuke, I'll record this explanation for you. The fire caused by the copy of the gasoline and matches is, so to speak, data, and was under Ushio's control.
She could arbitrarily set what to burn, making it a harmless fire to the building and us.
The fire was effective against the shadows... Normal shadows assimilated with Shide died instantly. It also had the effect of slowing Shide's movements.
Furthermore, Ushio's 'hacking' accidentally revealed that someone was inside Shide's body...
However, Haine scanned and erased the air in the gymnasium, extinguishing Shide by suffocation...
Outside air rushed into the suddenly vacuumed building, and they escaped in the confusion. We couldn't manage to scan Shide's true identity...
However, according to Ushio's testimony, she didn't sense any shadow presence from the hand inside, and it was definitely a human.
Shide suffered a burn on the left hand. This will likely serve as a mark to identify their true identity.
The air, though? How in the world...
I can copy both gases and liquids! But they have to be in some kind of container! Otherwise I can't scan them properly.
Ushio was also able to copy the gasoline in the can. If you consider the gymnasium as a 'container', I suppose it's possible.
But... even as an enemy, that's amazing...
I don't have the power to scan something on such a huge scale as a gymnasium...
We did learn a lot from tonight, though.
Ushio, come here! We'll proceed as planned.
Let's confirm one more time, Ushio! If you cut the connection with Haine... that link, is it really, truly safe!?
It worked with Roz and Gil.
Yeah! I just have to mess with its head a bit... Basically, I just have to make it the same as me!
If I do it now, I can easily finish it off like this, but are you sure about this, Mio?
Make my captured shadow into an ally...!!
(It's past 7:40. I'm hiding in the shadows of the school building, holding my breath.)
(Everyone else is waiting at their respective positions. Ushio is alone, deliberately waiting in an easy-to-spot location for the shadows to come.)
(Whether this strategy succeeds or not depends on teamwork... I'm counting on you first, Ushio!)
Ushio! They're coming from the front!
You brought quite a crowd with you, Shide!!
...Oh? I thought I'd get to see Shinpei-kun, but it's just Ushio-chan alone?
You have other allies, don't you? I bet they're hiding somewhere, right? Is this a trap?
Whether it's a trap or not, why don't you check for yourselves? Follow me!!
It looks incredibly like a trap. Haine, what should we do?
Tag, is it? Fine, I'll take that bait.
Wait a sec! We're Mio-chan's opponents!
Tetsu-san... It's dangerous to point something like that at people, isn't it?
Is that really something Mio-chan holding a kitchen knife should be saying!?
That's how it is. Forgive me, okay? This is also the job of a hero of justice!
(Toki-chan and the others successfully stopped Mio!)
(Shide and Haine's presence... Yeah, they're following me properly.)
(I have to lead them to that place, but I need to keep my distance as much as possible.)
(If I get caught, the 'trap' will become unusable.)
(There are more enemy shadows than expected... But it's okay, up ahead is...!)
Ushio-san, please leave this to me.
Come on, bring as many as you want!!
(...Next, I'll use the smoke flare on this sensor...!)
(Close the fire shutter and cut off the enemy's escape route! We have to reliably guide them to that hallway!)

(Ajiro-kun, everyone… please be safe…  
Defeat those shadows!!)

(It's about time…  
Ushio is rounding the corner!)
I brought Shide and Haine. They should show themselves soon.
Got it. Then Ushio, hide in the shadows and wait.
When I give the signal, move outside immediately.

Understood!  
Hurry and hide too, Shinpei!
(Those chasing Ushio will come around this corner)
(The hallway ahead is surrounded by us)
(Me, Nezu-san, Sou, and Mio. We'll fight using the copied rifle as our weapon.)
(However, we cannot print multiple copies of the rifle data 'simultaneously'.)
(But if we do it 'one by one, taking turns', we can print it.)
(Each member of our sniper team is holding a bundle of Ushio's hair in order to materialize the rifle.)
(When one person snipes, Ushio erases that rifle, and immediately prints it on the bundle of hair held by an ally in another location...)
(This makes continuous attacks possible, as if the number of rifles had multiplied!)
(Wh-What is that!? It looks like a giant spider!!)
(No, don't flinch!! Everyone... we're going according to plan!!)
(She'll move outside where she can overlook everyone, and prepare to activate the 'trap'.)
She dove in... and went outside, huh.
Who knows. It's probably just some monkey's shallow trick anyway.
Hm... Let's see what their next move is for now.
The hunter!! Outside the window... from the second floor!!
(So it doesn't work on flat surfaces after all! Then I'll just blast through the 3D body!!)
(Next is Sou...! Don't mess this up, Sou!)
Old man... even though you have a nice rifle, isn't your positioning a bit too close?
Nice, Sou! Next is Mio... stay calm!
(I don't need to land a hit...)
(Because drawing Shide's attention over here is my goal!)
I see, so that's the trick...
(...Next was supposed to be Shinpei, but from Shide's current position, he won't hit.)
(It's dangerous, but I'm counting on you once more, Sou.)
Where is the next one coming from--
That's enough. There's no need to play along with this. Let's reliably eliminate them one by one.
Is that so. Then, let's start with the old man...
(A hastily assembled team, using a rifle for the first time... It was a gamble whether it would go well, but)
(Everyone worked so hard to connect it to this point! There's no way I can fail!)
(I'll definitely land this shot! I'll connect these feelings to the future!!!)
(My position hasn't been discovered yet. From here, I can aim for Haine's 'main body'!)
(My target is Haine's shadow...! There's only a split-second chance!)
(I'll take her down in one shot!!)
(I'll aim for the absolute best timing...!)
(Wh-What happened!? The spider's arm reached here in an instant...)
